figures_detected.description: Camshaft and brackets installed on cylinder head, showing bracket numbering sequence (3, 2, 1) from left to right
Camshaft hub and sprocket installed on cylinder head with timing chain/belt
Cylinder head bolt showing maximum length L measurement; Hex head max 197.5 mm, TORX head max 197.1 mm
Cylinder head bolt tightening sequence diagram showing numbered bolt positions 1-10 with flywheel side indicated

notes: Always install new valve oil seals. Refer to "OIL SEAL REPLACEMENT", (EM-00).
When installing valve, apply engine oil on the valve stem and lip of valve oil seal.
Check whether the valve face is free from foreign matter.

steps.text: Install camshaft and brackets and tighten bracket nuts to the specified torque in two or three stages.
notes: Tighten bracket from center to outside.
Apply sealant to brackets No. 1 and No. 3.
Install new camshaft oil seal. Refer to "OIL SEAL REPLACEMENT", (EM-5017).

steps.text: Install camshaft hub and sprocket and tighten hub bolt to the specified torque using special service tool or a suitable tool.
Install camshaft locking pin SST KV109B0111.
Install intake and exhaust manifold, EGR valve, vacuum-pump and thermostat housing.
Install cylinder head gasket, with printing facing up.
notes: Confirm that the flywheel and injection pump locking pins are still fitted.
When replacing or repairing cylinder block, piston, connecting rod and crankshaft, select piston referring to "DETERMINING THE PISTON TYPE", (EM-5041).

steps.text: Check cylinder head bolt length, and replace if limit is exceeded.
Install cylinder head and tighten cylinder head bolts according to the following sequence.

content_blocks.text: Apply MOLYKOTE G RAPID PLUS to threads and under-head seating face of each bolt.

steps.text: Tighten bolts in the numerical order shown in the figure and following the steps below using angle wrenchs SST KV10112100.
notes: Tightening procedure: (a) Tighten all bolts to 40 N·m (4.1 kg-m, 29.5 ft-lb); (b) Turn all bolts 255° - 265°

steps.text: Install timing belt. Refer to "TIMING BELT", (EM-5011).

tools_referenced.name: Angle wrench
tools_referenced.usage: Tighten cylinder head bolts using angle tightening method
